commits: 5467b39: docs(0.5.3-LATENCY): design memo (offload + text cache + vLLM TTL)
e28caa2: test(0.5.3-LATENCY): RED — PII offload concurrency, post-redaction text cache, vLLM TTL+prewarm
dbb305c: perf(0.5.3-LATENCY): Presidio off the event loop; shared post-redaction text cache; vLLM TTL

design.offload_mechanism: pii_guard.async_pre_call_hook wraps the synchronous scrub work in `await asyncio.to_thread(...)` — the MCP-arguments scrub and the messages scrub are offloaded as two SEQUENTIAL awaits (never concurrent), so the request-local mapping/counters dicts are never shared across threads. _scrub_messages builds new message dicts ({**msg, 'content': ...}) and data['messages'] is reassigned after the await. Redaction entities/thresholds/format unchanged → byte-identical output + mapping + counters (parity test).
design.cache_contract: airlock/text_extract.py extract_text(data, call_type) is cache-aware: returns data['metadata']['_airlock_text'] when present (isinstance(metadata, dict) and key in metadata), else computes from the CURRENT messages and stores it. New request = new data = fresh metadata = fresh cache (no cross-request leakage).
design.post_redaction_order_argument: Guard order (config.yaml:745+) runs airlock-pii-guard FIRST (the only pre_call guard that mutates messages), then keyword, then fast-guardian. pii_guard calls refresh_text_cache(data, call_type) UNCONDITIONALLY after both to_thread awaits complete (pii_guard.py:255), so the cache holds POST-redaction text. When PII is disabled the hook early-returns before refresh, so the first downstream caller (keyword) computes+caches from the unchanged (= unredacted) messages. Either way keyword + guardian see the correct current text and extraction runs once per request. Pinned by TestTextCachePostRedaction + a once-per-request spy.
design.vllm_ttl_and_prewarm: local_vllm_router._DEFAULT_TTL 5.0 -> 30.0 (+ docstring/env-default mentions). prewarm() populates the /models cache best-effort and swallows `except Exception` so a cold cache still resolves correctly on first request; non-vLLM aliases never hit this path. Implemented as an idempotent method the router can call lazily; module-level startup wiring intentionally deferred to avoid editing the DO-NOT-TOUCH proxy_bootstrap.py (noted here per prompt §4 escalation guidance).

targeted: tests/test_pii_concurrency.py (2 passed — N concurrent AIRLOCK_PII_ENABLED requests do not serialize; event-loop heartbeat keeps ticking via a monkeypatched slow analyzer)
tests/test_pii_guard.py (redaction byte-parity + mapping/counters identical after offload)
tests/test_extract.py (post-redaction cache order + once-per-request + independent per-request caches)
tests/test_local_vllm_router.py (30s default TTL + env override; prewarm populates; prewarm swallows failure)
tests.regression_set: tests/test_pii_guard.py tests/test_extract.py tests/test_keyword_guard.py tests/test_fast_guardian.py tests/test_local_vllm_router.py = 230 passed

full_no_network_suite.note: The single failure is the known pre-existing fathom env/db failure documented at baseline and in 0.5.3-RACE-output.json — unrelated to this pack.

parity_evidence: Presidio redaction output, mapping, and counters byte-identical before vs after the offload (asserted in test_pii_guard.py); only threading + per-request caching changed.
concurrency_evidence: test_pii_concurrency.py proves the event loop is not blocked during Presidio work (heartbeat ticks continue; concurrent requests overlap rather than serialize).
additional_changes_made_in_scope: Added tests/test_pii_concurrency.py (new file, permitted by the pack prompt).
agent_verify_result: pass (full no-network suite: 2428 passed, 1 failed [known pre-existing fathom env], 107 skipped, 1 xpassed; targeted + 230-test regression set green; ruff check + format clean on all changed files)
